---
title: "Physics boosted with LLMs"
subtitle: "A working log of how large language models actually help (and fail) in BSM phenomenology research."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.lead-note}
Each post documents one **real research task**: the tool and model used, the workflow,
what worked, what failed, the time it saved, and — where possible — a link to code or a
notebook so you can reproduce it. Posts are tagged **English** or **Español**; use the
filter above to narrow by language or topic.
:::
